title: Trial of Ekrem Imamoglu, Erdogan’s Rival, Begins in Turkey
summary_full: Ekrem Imamoglu, the former mayor of Istanbul who stands accused of corruption, clashed with the judge and criticized the trial as baseless.
summary_public: Ekrem Imamoglu, the former mayor of Istanbul who stands accused of corruption, clashed with the judge and criticized the trial as baseless.
